title: Throttle Change Notification
description: Notification message sent to the participant when the Throttle parameters of one or more sessions are changed (immediately or scheduled), informing the previous and new inbound and outbound Throttle values per session.

participantIdentification.description: Provides details about the participant identification

throttleChanges.description: List of sessions and their respective throttle changes

changedBy.description: User responsible for performing the throttle change

notificationTimestamp.description: Timestamp of when the notification was generated

scheduled.description: Indicates whether the throttle change is scheduled (true) or applied immediately (false)

scheduledStartTime.description: Date and time when the scheduled throttle change becomes effective

examples.reason: Temporary increase to support expected volume peak
